items.claim: The fighter has a significant size advantage over his opponent.
items.quote: He's got a big size advantage.

items.claim: The fighter has a history of getting taken down repeatedly in fights.
items.quote: I can't watch him get taken down by Till Hamzad 12 times.

items.claim: The fighter has a history of gassing out during prolonged exchanges.
items.quote: Gas against Brunson in prolong exchange.

items.claim: The fighter lacks the power to finish opponents with his strikes.
items.quote: Usman doesn't have much of a damage threat.

items.claim: The fighter's striking style is funky, offbeat, and effective due to its unpredictability.
items.quote: DDP striking is so funky and offbeat. If he embraces the crazy a little, DDP is so live.

items.claim: The fighter consistently makes mistakes during his fights.
items.quote: People forget DDP is a goofball and makes mistakes consistently.

items.claim: The fighter's style is not fan-friendly.
items.quote: Paige the style that's not very fan friendly
